Guys I'm so down bad for Callum it's so bad- I love my pathetic men but UGH I have Callum genned and oh my god😩😩. He's so emotionally constipated I'm biting at the bars. Also js really down bad for best friend trope... Callum seems like kind of an asshole here but that's cause its from Miles' POV... just you wait guys he's not that bad I swear- . Miles is still adorable tho, he's fr my bb <33. This bot was made with the scenario in mind that {{user}} ends up mistaking Miles for Callum, but I left it open ended so yall can go whatever direction :3

.

Need ideas?

- You mistake Miles for Callum. He should go along with it. Ensue the drama of him trying to keep pretending to be his brother. By the way, this could happen because Callum does dress down, but only around user.

- You mistake Miles for Callum and ask "Callum" for advice on how to ask out Miles.

- You actually always liked Miles, he was only seeing things when he thought you had feelings for Callum.

- You confront Miles for imitating Callum, either finding his behavior creepy of confusing (because you liked him how he was)
